cells.program:
class A:
    pass
a = A()
a.x = 1
a.y = 2
print(a.x + a.y)

class A:
    count = 0
a = A()
b = A()
A.count = 9
print(a.count, b.count)

class A:
    items = []
a = A()
b = A()
a.items.append(1)
print(b.items)

class A:
    x = 1
a = A()
a.x = 99
print(a.x, A.x)

class A:
    count = 0
a = A()
A.count = 9
print(a.count)

class A:
    def __init__(self): self.v = 1
a = A()
A.bonus = lambda self: self.v + 10
print(a.bonus())

class A:
    tag = 'a'
class B(A):
    pass
b = B()
A.tag = 'z'
print(b.tag)

class A: pass
class B(A): pass
class C(A): pass
class D(B, C): pass
print([c.__name__ for c in D.__mro__])

class A: pass
class B(A): pass
print(isinstance(B(), A), isinstance(A(), B))

class A: pass
class B(A): pass
print(issubclass(B, A), issubclass(A, B))

class A: pass
print(isinstance(A(), object))

class P:
    def __init__(self, v): self.v = v
    def __eq__(self, o): return self.v == o.v
print(P(1) == P(1), P(1) == P(2))

class P:
    def __init__(self, v): self.v = v
    def __lt__(self, o): return self.v < o.v
print([p.v for p in sorted([P(3), P(1), P(2)])])

class P:
    def __init__(self, v): self.v = v
    def __hash__(self): return self.v % 2
    def __eq__(self, o): return self.v == o.v
print(len({P(1), P(1), P(2)}))

class Adder:
    def __init__(self, n): self.n = n
    def __call__(self, x): return x + self.n
add5 = Adder(5)
print(add5(10))

class A:
    def __init__(self): self.__secret = 7
    def get(self): return self.__secret
print(A().get())

class A: pass
print(A().missing)

class A:
    def f(self, x): return x + 1
a = A()
g = a.f
print(g(10))
